creator: nq1n407ba@disabled.account.local
text:
Hi,

I rebuilt darktable, gtk3, and cups with debugging symbols. Running with gdb from ports (copied from the terminal):

Looking at that point in the sources:

  // we have the exported buffer, let's apply the printer profile

  if (*ps->v_piccprofile)
    if (dt_apply_printer_profile(imgid, (void **)&(dat.ps->buf), dat.width, dat.height, dat.bpp,
                                 dt_colorspaces_get_profile(ps->v_picctype, ps->v_piccprofile,
                                                            DT_PROFILE_DIRECTION_OUT)->profile,
                                 ps->v_pintent, ps->v_black_point_compensation))
    {
[...]

it looks to me like there are too many pointer dereferences without proper checking, I guess there's a null somewhere. This looks more like an upstream error, I'll report it to them.

Thanks for your help!
